narrative:
Delaware Twp township has 3,035 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points.
